The Hard Truth

YOUR CAMERA ROLL IS WHERE
$100K CONTRACTS
GO TO DIE.

You're a world-class builder. Your portfolio proves it. Your phone doesn't.

The Scene
You're at the Kitchen Table.
You're sitting with a potential client. They're sold on your numbers. Now they want to see "the vibe." You start scrolling. Past lumber receipts, blurry crawlspace shots, and 4,000 personal photos while the client waits in silence.
The Moment You Lose It
Every Second Is a Doubt.
Every second you spend searching is a second they spend questioning. If you can't organize your own photos, how are you going to organize a six-figure gut renovation? When you look disorganized, you look like a "guy with a truck."
!
The builder who looks most professional in the room almost always gets the job. Regardless of who actually builds better.
Sound Familiar?

THE OLD WAY ISN'T WORKING.

Most builders are relying on the same broken system to win six-figure contracts. Here's what that looks like in the room.

✕
The Endless Scroll
"Hold on, I know I have a photo of that kitchen somewhere..." Three minutes later, the client has mentally moved on.
✕
The Social Media Portfolio
Compressed photos, cluttered feeds, and competitor ads running right next to your best work. Not exactly a luxury presentation.
✕
The "I'll Email It Later"
You leave the bid promising to send photos. The momentum is gone. They're already talking to someone else by the time your email lands.
The Difference

THE ESPOSA STANDARD.

Here's what changes when you show up with a professional showroom instead.

✕
The Old Way
✓
The Esposa Way
✕Scrolling for 3 minutes to find one bathroom photo at a bid
✓One tap opens your entire branded portfolio instantly
✕"Hold on, I know it's in here somewhere..." while the client waits
✓Instant authority. You're showing, not searching.
✕Technical specs and numbers that go over the homeowner's head
✓Curated visuals that speak the decision-maker's language
✕Looking like a sub-contractor with an iPhone and a prayer
✓Looking like a design-build firm with a brand and a standard
✕Hours lost organizing files, drives, and social media posts
✓You text the photos. We handle everything else. No software to learn.
The Esposa Lens

WIN THE
DECISION-MAKER'S
VETO.

We didn't name this "Esposa" (The Wife) just because we're a wife-and-wife team. We named it because we know who actually makes the final call on a high-end remodel.

Homeowners' partners aren't looking at your choice of sub-flooring. They're looking for proof of taste and organization. We curate your work so your portfolio clears the highest aesthetic bar in the house.

"We make you the only 'safe' choice for her home."
How We Curate Your Portfolio
01

Organized by Room and Style

Kitchens. Baths. Additions. Every project categorized so clients find exactly what resonates with them.

02

Curated for Impact

We select your strongest shots. Not everything — the best of everything. Quality over quantity, every time.

03

Written for the Homeowner

Project titles and descriptions written to speak to the decision-maker, not the contractor. Her language, your work.

04

Delivered to Your Home Screen

A custom icon. Your brand. One tap. Your entire legacy, always in your pocket at every bid.

The Process

YOU BUILD IT.
WE FILE IT.

No portals. No logins. No learning new software. Just three steps.

01
📲
The Text
Finish a project? Text 5 to 10 photos directly to our design desk from your phone. That's the entire job on your end. We handle the rest.
02
🗂️
The Folder
We curate, title, and upload your photos to your branded mobile showroom. Organized, beautiful, and ready before your next bid.
03
📱
The Close
One tap on your home screen icon opens your entire portfolio. Let the visual proof do the selling. Walk into every bid looking like a $1M firm.

The Math

$129 IS A
ROUNDING ERROR.

On a single closed contract, it pays for itself 32 times over.

Who We Are

WE SPEAK
HER LANGUAGE.
YOU GET THE JOB.

We're a wife-and-wife team and the founders of Esposa Designs. We built this because we understand something most marketing agencies don't: in a high-end home renovation, the partner's approval isn't a formality. It's the deal.

We've spent years obsessing over what makes a home feel designed rather than assembled. We bring that same eye to your portfolio — organizing your work so it communicates quality, taste, and trust to the people who matter most.

You build beautiful homes. We make sure everyone in that kitchen knows it before the contract is signed.

Our Standards
◆
Curated, not collected. We don't dump all your photos in a folder. We choose the shots that close deals.
◆
Her eye, your work. Every portfolio is organized through the lens of the homeowner making the final call.
◆
Zero friction. You text photos. Everything else is handled. No software, no training, no time wasted.
◆
Always on. Your showroom is live 24/7, on every device, one tap from your home screen.
